\caption{Per-layer-group action MSE (vs FP16) when only that group is quantized, split by LIBERO suite. $n=128$ frames per (group, bit-width, suite) cell. $\Delta\%$ is the relative change Long\,vs.\,Object. Across 42 layer groups and three bit-widths, the per-frame Long-vs-Object gap is typically within $\pm 30\%$ and uncorrelated with the absolute sensitivity rank, supporting the claim that single-frame quantization sensitivity is essentially the same on Object and Long suites.}
\label{tab:exp2-suite-split}
